use_codes.desc: USE AS A BILE ACID SEQUESTRANT

indications.text:
Welchol™, administered alone or in combination with an HMG-CoA reductase inhibitor,
is indicated as adjunctive therapy to diet and exercise for the reduction of elevated LDL
cholesterol in patients with primary hypercholesterolemia (Fredrickson Type IIa).
Therapy with lipid lowering agents should be...
